message:
fix(daemon): Fix TOCTOU race condition in in-flight request limiting

The previous code checked in_flight count and incremented it in two
separate lock acquisitions, creating a race window where multiple
requests could pass the check before any incremented the counter,
potentially exceeding MAX_IN_FLIGHT.

Fixed by performing both check and increment under a single lock
acquisition. The lock is released before I/O operations to avoid
holding it during network writes.

Also added clippy allow for len_zero on SessionOutputs in mxbai_reranker
since that type doesn't implement is_empty().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
